description: Prompt-free usage and cost evidence from the append-only AI Gateway ledger. Unknown values stay unknown. Booked cost never changes; current cost includes confirmed backdate adjustments. Request IDs appear only in the bounded audit table and are not metric labels.

panels.description: Top models by current configured cost. The five token classes remain separate. Unknown-cost counts show where totals cannot be reconciled.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(requested_model, 'unattributed') AS "model",
  COUNT(*) AS "requests",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'failure') AS "failed_requests",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE usage_completeness <> 'complete') AS "incomplete_usage",
  SUM(normal_input_tokens) AS "normal_input_tokens",
  SUM(cache_creation_5m_tokens) AS "cache_creation_5m_tokens",
  SUM(cache_creation_1h_tokens) AS "cache_creation_1h_tokens",
  SUM(cache_read_tokens) AS "cache_read_tokens",
  SUM(output_tokens) AS "output_tokens",
  CASE WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'success' AND current_configured_total_cost_usd IS NULL) = 0
       THEN SUM(current_configured_total_cost_usd) FILTER (WHERE status = 'success') END AS "current_cost_usd",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'success' AND current_configured_total_cost_usd IS NULL) AS "unknown_cost_rows"
FROM aigw_governance.usage_reporting
WHERE $__timeFilter(occurred_at)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY current_cost_usd DESC NULLS LAST, requests DESC
LIMIT 10

panels.title: Model Usage and Current Cost

panels.description: Top project and model pairs. Missing signed project identity stays visible as unattributed.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(project_id, 'unattributed') AS "project",
  COALESCE(requested_model, 'unattributed') AS "model",
  COUNT(*) AS "requests",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'failure') AS "failed_requests",
  SUM(normal_input_tokens + cache_creation_5m_tokens + cache_creation_1h_tokens + cache_read_tokens + output_tokens) AS "known_tokens",
  CASE WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'success' AND current_configured_total_cost_usd IS NULL) = 0
       THEN SUM(current_configured_total_cost_usd) FILTER (WHERE status = 'success') END AS "current_cost_usd"
FROM aigw_governance.usage_reporting
WHERE $__timeFilter(occurred_at)
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY current_cost_usd DESC NULLS LAST, requests DESC
LIMIT 20

panels.title: Top Project and Model Pairs

panels.description: Top stable user and model pairs. This uses the signed stable user ID, not a request header or prompt field.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(stable_user_id, 'unattributed') AS "user",
  COALESCE(requested_model, 'unattributed') AS "model",
  COUNT(*) AS "requests",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'failure') AS "failed_requests",
  SUM(normal_input_tokens + cache_creation_5m_tokens + cache_creation_1h_tokens + cache_read_tokens + output_tokens) AS "known_tokens",
  CASE WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'success' AND current_configured_total_cost_usd IS NULL) = 0
       THEN SUM(current_configured_total_cost_usd) FILTER (WHERE status = 'success') END AS "current_cost_usd"
FROM aigw_governance.usage_reporting
WHERE $__timeFilter(occurred_at)
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY current_cost_usd DESC NULLS LAST, requests DESC
LIMIT 20

panels.title: Top User and Model Pairs

panels.description: Daily known token totals. Missing or partial usage is shown in the data-quality panel and is never filled with zero.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  date_trunc('day', occurred_at) AS "time",
  SUM(normal_input_tokens) AS "normal_input",
  SUM(cache_creation_5m_tokens) AS "cache_creation_5m",
  SUM(cache_creation_1h_tokens) AS "cache_creation_1h",
  SUM(cache_read_tokens) AS "cache_read",
  SUM(output_tokens) AS "output"
FROM aigw_governance.usage_reporting
WHERE $__timeFilter(occurred_at)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Daily Token Mix

panels.description: Daily cost sources. A line is blank for a day when any successful row lacks that cost source. Booked cost is original evidence. Current cost includes confirmed adjustments.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  date_trunc('day', occurred_at) AS "time",
  CASE WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'success' AND litellm_cost_usd IS NULL) = 0 THEN SUM(litellm_cost_usd) FILTER (WHERE status = 'success') END AS "litellm_cost",
  CASE WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'success' AND provider_cost_usd IS NULL) = 0 THEN SUM(provider_cost_usd) FILTER (WHERE status = 'success') END AS "provider_cost",
  CASE WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'success' AND booked_configured_total_cost_usd IS NULL) = 0 THEN SUM(booked_configured_total_cost_usd) FILTER (WHERE status = 'success') END AS "booked_configured_cost",
  CASE WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'success' AND current_configured_total_cost_usd IS NULL) = 0 THEN SUM(current_configured_total_cost_usd) FILTER (WHERE status = 'success') END AS "current_configured_cost"
FROM aigw_governance.usage_reporting
WHERE $__timeFilter(occurred_at)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Daily Cost Reconciliation

panels.description: Configured cost by token class. A class total stays unknown when any positive-token component has no reviewed price.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  usage_class AS "usage_class",
  SUM(token_count) AS "known_tokens",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE token_count > 0 AND current_cost_usd IS NULL) AS "unknown_cost_rows",
  CASE WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE token_count > 0 AND booked_cost_usd IS NULL) = 0 THEN SUM(booked_cost_usd) END AS "booked_cost_usd",
  CASE WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE token_count > 0 AND current_cost_usd IS NULL) = 0 THEN SUM(current_cost_usd) END AS "current_cost_usd"
FROM aigw_governance.usage_component_reporting
WHERE $__timeFilter(occurred_at)
  AND status = 'success'
GROUP BY usage_class
ORDER BY usage_class

panels.title: Cost by Token Class

panels.description: Counts that explain incomplete reconciliation. Unknown is a gap, not zero. Adjustment count is append-only history.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS "requests",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'failure') AS "failed_requests",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE usage_completeness = 'partial') AS "partial_usage",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE usage_completeness = 'unknown') AS "unknown_usage",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'success' AND litellm_cost_usd IS NULL) AS "unknown_litellm_cost",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'success' AND provider_cost_usd IS NULL) AS "unknown_provider_cost",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'success' AND current_configured_total_cost_usd IS NULL) AS "unknown_configured_cost",
  SUM(adjustment_count) AS "adjustments"
FROM aigw_governance.usage_reporting
WHERE $__timeFilter(occurred_at)

panels.title: Accounting Data Quality

panels.description: LiteLLM completed the provider response but could not deliver its prompt-free usage event. The provider response is not retried because that could cause a second charge. Investigate every gap.
panels.title: Accounting Delivery Gaps

panels.description: The newest 100 prompt-free evidence rows. Request ID is shown only here for audit joins. It is never a Prometheus or Loki label.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  occurred_at AS "time",
  event_id AS "event_id",
  request_id AS "request_id",
  COALESCE(requested_model, 'unattributed') AS "requested_model",
  COALESCE(actual_model, 'unattributed') AS "actual_model",
  COALESCE(project_id, 'unattributed') AS "project",
  COALESCE(stable_user_id, 'unattributed') AS "user",
  status,
  usage_completeness,
  litellm_cost_usd,
  provider_cost_usd,
  booked_configured_total_cost_usd,
  current_configured_total_cost_usd,
  adjustment_count
FROM aigw_governance.usage_reporting
WHERE $__timeFilter(occurred_at)
ORDER BY occurred_at DESC, event_id
LIMIT 100

panels.title: Recent Usage Evidence

title: AI Gateway Model Usage and Cost
